name: Travis Japan Summer Vacation!! in the USA
original_name: Travis Japan Summer Vacation!! ―7人のアメリカ旅―
overview: Travis Japan embarks on a summer road trip through the Rocky Mountains in North America. Divided into teams, one hits the road by RV, the other dives into local culture. With new horizons to explore and heartfelt connections to make, this road trip promises to be unlike any other.
